mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARMUSER A2 WHERE 1=1 AND A2.USER_SE = 'ANR' AND A2.MBER_STTUS = 'P'
AND (DECRYPT(A2.USER_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR A2.SCHOOL_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

SELECT COALESCE(A1.ESNTL_ID, '') AS ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(A1.USER_ID, '') AS USER_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.EMAIL_ADRES), '') AS EMAIL_ADRES , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(A1.USR_TELNO), 'N'), '') AS USR_TELNO , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(A1.MBTLNUM), 'N'), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(A1.BRTHDY, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS BRTHDY , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.IHIDNUM), A1.IHIDNUM, '') AS IHIDNUM , COALESCE(A1.SEXDSTN_CODE, 'M') AS SEXDSTN_CODE , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ZIP), '') AS ZIP , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ADRES_LOT), '') AS ADRES_LOT , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ADRES), '') AS ADRES , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.DETAIL_ADRES), '') AS DETAIL_ADRES , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(A1.OFFM_TELNO), 'N'), '') AS OFFM_TELNO , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.FXNUM), '') AS FXNUM , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_ID, '') AS SCHOOL_ID , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_GB, '') AS SCHOOL_GB , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_NM, '') AS SCHOOL_NM , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_LVL, 0) AS SCHOOL_LVL , COALESCE(A1.SCHOOL_NO, 0) AS SCHOOL_NO , COALESCE(A1.PAY_BANK_CODE, '') AS PAY_BANK_CODE , COALESCE((SELECT CODE_NM FROM LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'ARM002' AND CODE = A1.PAY_BANK_CODE), '') AS PAY_BANK_CODE_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.PAY_BANK), '') AS PAY_BANK , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.HOLDER_NM), '') AS HOLDER_NM , COALESCE(A1.MBER_STTUS, '') AS MBER_STTUS , CASE A1.MBER_STTUS WHEN 'A' THEN '대기' WHEN 'P' THEN '사용' WHEN 'D' THEN '탈퇴' ELSE A1.MBER_STTUS END AS MBER_STTUS_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.SBSCRB_DE, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS SBSCRB_DE , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.SECSN_DE, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS SECSN_DE , COALESCE(IF(A1.LOCK_AT = 'Y', '잠금', '해제'), '해제') AS LOCK_AT , COALESCE(A1.USER_SE, '') AS USER_SE , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.CHG_LAST_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CHG_LAST_DT , COALESCE(A1.GROUP_ID, '') AS GROUP_ID , COALESCE(A1.ORGNZT_ID, '') AS ORGNZT_ID , COALESCE(A1.INDUTY_CODE, '') AS INDUTY_CODE , COALESCE(A1.BIZRNO, '') AS BIZRNO , COALESCE(A1.ENTRPRS_SE_CODE, '') AS ENTRPRS_SE_CODE , COALESCE(A1.CXFC, '') AS CXFC , COALESCE(A1.PSTINST_CODE, '') AS PSTINST_CODE , COALESCE(A1.OFCPS_NM, '') AS OFCPS_NM , COALESCE(A1.EMPL_NO, '') AS EMPL_NO , COALESCE(A1.APPLCNT_NM, '') AS APPLCNT_NM , COALESCE(A1.CRTFC_DN_VALUE, '') AS CRTFC_DN_VALUE , COALESCE(A1.CRTFC_CN_VALUE, '') AS CRTFC_CN_VALUE , COALESCE(A1.TOKEN_ID, '') AS TOKEN_ID , A1.LOCK_CNT AS LOCK_CNT , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.LOCK_LAST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS LOCK_LAST_PNTTM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM , COALESCE(A1.TERMS1_YN, 'N') AS TERMS1_YN , COALESCE(A1.TERMS2_YN, 'N') AS TERMS2_YN , COALESCE(A1.TERMS3_YN, 'N') AS TERMS3_YN , COALESCE(A1.TERMS4_YN, 'N') AS TERMS4_YN , COALESCE(A1.NOTICE_YN, 'N') AS NOTICE_YN , COALESCE(A1.EVENT_NOTI_YN, 'N') AS EVENT_NOTI_YN , COALESCE(A1.MAIL_NOTI_YN, 'N') AS MAIL_NOTI_YN , COALESCE(A1.SMS_NOTI_YN, 'N') AS SMS_NOTI_YN , COALESCE(A1.OAUTH_GB, '') AS OAUTH_GB , COALESCE(A1.NAVER_AUTH_ID, '') AS NAVER_AUTH_ID , COALESCE(A1.KAKAO_AUTH_ID, '') AS KAKAO_AUTH_ID , COALESCE(A1.CERT_YN, 'N') AS CERT_YN , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.CERT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS CERT_DATE , COALESCE(A1.PROFILE, '') AS PROFILE , COALESCE(A1.PROFILE_GB, '') AS PROFILE_GB , COALESCE(A1.TEST_YN, 'N') AS TEST_YN , COALESCE(A1.SESSION_KEY, '') AS SESSION_KEY , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.SESSION_LIMIT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') AS SESSION_LIMIT , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.APPROVE_DE, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS APPROVE_DE , COALESCE(A1.USER_PIC, '') AS USER_PIC , COALESCE(A1.CITIZEN_YN, 'N') AS CITIZEN_YN , COALESCE(A1.SINGLE_YN, 'N') AS SINGLE_YN , COALESCE(A1.MINOR_YN, 'N') AS MINOR_YN , COALESCE(A1.BASIC_YN, 'N') AS BASIC_YN , COALESCE(A1.POOR_YN, 'N') AS POOR_YN , CASE WHEN A1.BASIC_YN = 'Y' AND A1.POOR_YN = 'Y' THEN '기초생활수급자, 차상위계층' WHEN A1.BASIC_YN = 'Y' THEN '기초생활수급자' WHEN A1.POOR_YN = 'Y' THEN '차상위계층' ELSE '' END AS LOW_INCOME_NM , COALESCE(A1.FARM_YN, 'N') AS FARM_YN , COALESCE(A1.ATTA_FILE, '') AS ATTA_FILE , COALESCE(A1.SUBJECT_DESC, '') AS SUBJECT_DESC , COALESCE(A1.PROFILE_DESC, '') AS PROFILE_DESC , COALESCE(A1.BIZNO_FILE, '') AS BIZNO_FILE , COALESCE(A1.RELATION_GB, 'M') AS RELATION_GB , CASE A1.RELATION_GB WHEN 'F' THEN '부' WHEN 'M' THEN '모' WHEN 'E' THEN '기타' ELSE '' END AS RELATION_GB_NM , COALESCE(A1.FARM_DESC, '') AS FARM_DESC FROM ARMUSER A1 WHERE A1.ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}

SELECT COALESCE(A2.ESNTL_ID, '') AS ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(A2.CXFC, '') AS CXFC , COALESCE(A2.BIZRNO, '') AS BIZRNO , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.FXNUM), '') AS FXNUM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.EMAIL_ADRES), '') AS EMAIL_ADRES , COALESCE(A2.SCHOOL_NM, '') AS SCHOOL_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.ADRES), '') AS ADRES , COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.DETAIL_ADRES), '') AS DETAIL_ADRES , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(A2.OFFM_TELNO), 'N'), '') AS OFFM_TELNO , COALESCE(FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(A2.MBTLNUM), 'N'), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE( ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT D.SUB_NM ORDER BY D.SUB_NM SEPARATOR ',') FROM ARTEDUM AM INNER JOIN ARTEDUD D ON D.EDU_ESNTL_ID = AM.EDU_ESNTL_ID AND D.EDU_GB = AM.EDU_GB AND D.STTUS_CODE = 'A' WHERE AM.EDU_ESNTL_ID = A2.ESNTL_ID AND AM.STTUS_CODE = 'A' ), '' ) AS SUBJECT_DESC , COALESCE(A2.USER_PIC, '') AS USER_PIC , (SELECT MIN(F.SEQ) FROM ARTFILE F WHERE F.FILE_ID = A2.USER_PIC AND TRIM(COALESCE(A2.USER_PIC, '')) != '' ) AS USER_PIC_SEQ , COALESCE(A2.PROFILE_DESC, '') AS PROFILE_DESC , COALESCE(A2.OAUTH_GB, '') AS OAUTH_GB , COALESCE(A2.NAVER_AUTH_ID, '') AS NAVER_AUTH_ID , COALESCE(A2.KAKAO_AUTH_ID, '') AS KAKAO_AUTH_ID FROM ARMUSER A2 WHERE 1=1 AND A2.USER_SE = 'ANR' AND A2.ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARMUSER ( ESNTL_ID, USER_SE, USER_ID, PASSWORD, PASSWORD_HINT, PASSWORD_CNSR, USER_NM, IHIDNUM, USR_TELNO, OFFM_TELNO, FXNUM, MBTLNUM, EMAIL_ADRES, ZIP, ADRES_LOT, ADRES, DETAIL_ADRES, BRTHDY, SEXDSTN_CODE, MBER_STTUS, SBSCRB_DE, CHG_LAST_DT, GROUP_ID, ORGNZT_ID, INDUTY_CODE, BIZRNO, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE, CXFC, PSTINST_CODE, OFCPS_NM, EMPL_NO, APPLCNT_NM, SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_GB, SCHOOL_NM, SCHOOL_LVL, SCHOOL_NO, PAY_BANK_CODE, PAY_BANK, HOLDER_NM, SINGLE_YN, BASIC_YN, POOR_YN, CERT_YN, CERT_DATE, CRTFC_DN_VALUE, PROFILE, PROFILE_GB, TEST_YN, SESSION_KEY, SESSION_LIMIT, APPROVE_DE, USER_PIC, CITIZEN_YN, MINOR_YN, FARM_YN, ATTA_FILE, SUBJECT_DESC, PROFILE_DESC, BIZNO_FILE, RELATION_GB, FARM_DESC, TERMS1_YN, TERMS2_YN, TERMS3_YN, TERMS4_YN, NOTICE_YN, EVENT_NOTI_YN, MAIL_NOTI_YN, SMS_NOTI_YN, OAUTH_GB, NAVER_AUTH_ID, KAKAO_AUTH_ID ) VALUES ( #{esntlId}, #{userSe}, #{userId}, #{password}, #{passwordHint}, #{passwordCnsr}, ENCRYPT(#{userNm}), ENCRYPT(#{ihidnum}), ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{usrTelno}, '-', '')), ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{offmTelno}, '-', '')), ENCRYPT(#{fxnum}), ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{mbtlnum}, '-', '')), ENCRYPT(#{emailAdres}), ENCRYPT(#{zip}), ENCRYPT(#{adresLot}), ENCRYPT(#{adres}), ENCRYPT(#{detailAdres}), REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{brthdy}, '-', ''), ' ', ''), '.', ''), #{sexdstnCode}, COALESCE(#{mberSttus}, 'P'), #{sbscrbDe}NULL, NOW(), #{groupId}, #{orgnztId}, #{indutyCode}, #{bizrno}, #{entrpsSeCode}, #{cxfc}, #{pstinstCode}, #{ofcpsNm}, #{emplNo}, #{applcntNm}, #{schoolId}, #{schoolGb}, #{schoolNm}, #{schoolLvl}, #{schoolNo}, #{payBankCode}, ENCRYPT(#{payBank}), ENCRYPT(#{holderNm}), COALESCE(#{singleYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{basicYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{poorYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{certYn}, 'N'), #{certDate}, #{crtfcDnValue}NULL, #{profile}, #{profileGb}, COALESCE(#{testYn}, 'N'), #{sessionKey}, #{sessionLimit}, #{approveDe}, #{userPic}, COALESCE(#{citizenYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{minorYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{farmYn}, 'N'), #{attaFile}, #{subjectDesc}, #{profileDesc}, #{biznoFile}, COALESCE(#{relationGb}, 'M'), #{farmDesc}, COALESCE(#{terms1Yn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{terms2Yn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{terms3Yn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{terms4Yn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{noticeYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{eventNotiYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{mailNotiYn}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{smsNotiYn}, 'N'), #{oauthGb}, #{naverAuthId}, #{kakaoAuthId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ARMUSER SET USER_SE = #{userSe}, USER_ID = #{userId}, PASSWORD = #{password}, CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM = NOW(), PASSWORD_HINT = #{passwordHint}, PASSWORD_CNSR = #{passwordCnsr}, USER_NM = ENCRYPT(#{userNm}), IHIDNUM = ENCRYPT(#{ihidnum}), USR_TELNO = ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{usrTelno}, '-', '')), OFFM_TELNO = ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{offmTelno}, '-', '')), FXNUM = ENCRYPT(#{fxnum}), MBTLNUM = ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{mbtlnum}, '-', '')), EMAIL_ADRES = ENCRYPT(#{emailAdres}), ZIP = ENCRYPT(#{zip}), ADRES_LOT = ENCRYPT(#{adresLot}), ADRES = ENCRYPT(#{adres}), DETAIL_ADRES = ENCRYPT(#{detailAdres}), BRTHDY = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{brthdy}, '-', ''), ' ', ''), '.', ''), SEXDSTN_CODE = #{sexdstnCode}, MBER_STTUS = #{mberSttus}, SBSCRB_DE = #{sbscrbDe}, SECSN_DE = #{secsnDe}, LOCK_AT = 'Y', LOCK_CNT = 5, LOCK_LAST_PNTTM = NOW(), LOCK_AT = NULL, LOCK_CNT = NULL, LOCK_LAST_PNTTM = NULL, GROUP_ID = #{groupId}, ORGNZT_ID = #{orgnztId}, INDUTY_CODE = #{indutyCode}, BIZRNO = #{bizrno}, ENTRPRS_SE_CODE = #{entrpsSeCode}, CXFC = #{cxfc}, PSTINST_CODE = #{pstinstCode}, OFCPS_NM = #{ofcpsNm}, EMPL_NO = #{emplNo}, APPLCNT_NM = #{applcntNm}, SCHOOL_ID = #{schoolId}, SCHOOL_GB = #{schoolGb}, SCHOOL_NM = #{schoolNm}, SCHOOL_LVL = #{schoolLvl}, SCHOOL_NO = #{schoolNo}, PAY_BANK_CODE = #{payBankCode}, PAY_BANK = ENCRYPT(#{payBank}), HOLDER_NM = ENCRYPT(#{holderNm}), SINGLE_YN = COALESCE(#{singleYn}, 'N'), BASIC_YN = COALESCE(#{basicYn}, 'N'), POOR_YN = COALESCE(#{poorYn}, 'N'), CERT_YN = COALESCE(#{certYn}, 'N'), CRTFC_DN_VALUE = #{crtfcDnValue}, CERT_DATE = #{certDate}, PROFILE = #{profile}, PROFILE_GB = #{profileGb}, TEST_YN = COALESCE(#{testYn}, 'N'), SESSION_KEY = #{sessionKey}, SESSION_LIMIT = #{sessionLimit}, APPROVE_DE = #{approveDe}, USER_PIC = #{userPic}, CITIZEN_YN = COALESCE(#{citizenYn}, 'N'), MINOR_YN = COALESCE(#{minorYn}, 'N'), FARM_YN = COALESCE(#{farmYn}, 'N'), ATTA_FILE = #{attaFile}, SUBJECT_DESC = #{subjectDesc}, PROFILE_DESC = #{profileDesc}, BIZNO_FILE = #{biznoFile}, RELATION_GB = COALESCE(#{relationGb}, 'M'), FARM_DESC = #{farmDesc}, TERMS1_YN = COALESCE(#{terms1Yn}, 'N'), TERMS2_YN = COALESCE(#{terms2Yn}, 'N'), TERMS3_YN = COALESCE(#{terms3Yn}, 'N'), TERMS4_YN = COALESCE(#{terms4Yn}, 'N'), NOTICE_YN = COALESCE(#{noticeYn}, 'N'), EVENT_NOTI_YN = COALESCE(#{eventNotiYn}, 'N'), MAIL_NOTI_YN = COALESCE(#{mailNotiYn}, 'N'), SMS_NOTI_YN = COALESCE(#{smsNotiYn}, 'N'), CHG_LAST_DT = NOW() WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}
UPDATE ARMUSER SET MBER_STTUS = 'D' , SECSN_DE = NOW() , CHG_LAST_DT = NOW() WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}
